# Missing databases are rejected unless creation is explicit.
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/missing.db --host 192.0.2.1 --port 0
stderr 'database path does not exist'
! exists $WORK/missing.db

# Explicit creation happens before listener startup.
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/created.db --create --host 192.0.2.1 --port 0
stderr 'listen error:'
exists $WORK/created.db

# New databases cannot be created without applying migrations.
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/unmigrated.db --create --migrate=false --host 192.0.2.1 --port 0
stderr '--migrate=false requires an existing database'
! exists $WORK/unmigrated.db

# Existing databases can be opened without applying migrations.
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/created.db --migrate=false --host 192.0.2.1 --port 0
stderr 'listen error:'
